mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vehicle_lifecycle (vin, time, operate, result, entry_id) VALUES (#{vin}, #{time}, #{operate}, #{result}, #{entryId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, vin, time, operate, result FROM vehicle_lifecycle WHERE vin = #{vin} and time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT vin FROM vehicle_lifecycle WHERE vin IS NOT NULL and time <= #{endTime} and time >= #{startTime} ORDER BY vin
